commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Adds `OPENCLAW_LIVE_GATEWAY_MODELS=small` support, small-model selection/capping in the gateway live profile test, and docs for the new live recipe.

PR surface: Tests +87, Docs +4. Total +91 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: the changed gateway small-mode path passes unfiltered small refs to dynamic preparation, while the sibling direct harness filters them by provider first. I did not execute live provider calls in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Queue a narrow repair to preserve provider scoping in the new gateway small-mode dynamic-load path.

target.title: test(gateway): add small model live profile
target.body:
## Summary

- add `OPENCLAW_LIVE_GATEWAY_MODELS=small` to the gateway live model profile harness
- reuse the direct-model small allowlist, provider scoping, dynamic prioritized refs, and small-model cap for full gateway+agent validation
- document the small-model gateway recipe next to the existing direct-model recipe

Related: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.live.config.ts --configLoader runner src/gateway/gateway-models.profiles.live.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/help/testing-live.md`
- `node scripts/docs-list.js`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/gateway/gateway-models.profiles.live.test.ts docs/help/testing-live.md`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/gateway/gateway-models.profiles.live.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: small-model live validation can now run through the full gateway+agent path instead of only the direct completion path.
Real environment tested: local macOS worktree, live Vitest config with provider calls skipped because live env is not enabled.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.live.config.ts --configLoader runner src/gateway/gateway-models.profiles.live.test.ts --reporter=dot`
Evidence after fix: targeted live-config test passed, 80 tests passed and 2 live-provider tests skipped.
Observed result after fix: `OPENCLAW_LIVE_GATEWAY_MODELS=small` is parsed as a curated small-model gateway sweep, gets the small provider/model cap, can load prioritized dynamic small refs, and uses small-model selection ordering.
What was not tested: real live provider execution with small-model credentials; remote changed gate was blocked by Crabbox coordinator capacity (`active lease limit exceeded: 10/8`), and Blacksmith Testbox was unavailable because the local CLI is not authenticated.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
